questions.text: What is the effect of setting temperature parameter T very close to 0 (e.g., T = 0.01)?
options: The generation becomes highly deterministic, approaching greedy search.
The generation process diverges and crashes.
The context window decreases to zero.
questions.correct_answer: The generation becomes highly deterministic, approaching greedy search.
questions.explanation: As T approaches 0, the probability mass concentrates almost entirely on the token with the highest logit value, making generation deterministic.
